title: LegenVD
description:
Magic the Gathering strategy videos with a focus on the digital Magic Arena.
This channel is supported by its fans on Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/LegenVD

videos.title: This bunny stimulates population growth.
videos.description:
Magic: The Gathering Arena deck tech & gameplay with a white/red/green or Naya token doubling deck, featuring Baylen, the Haymaker from Bloomburrow in Brawl. 

Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/LegenVD

14:00 - vs Etali, Primal Conqueror
17:48 - vs Teshar, Ancestor's Apostle
21:36 - vs Rigo, Streetwise Mentor
33:37 - vs Rowanne, Starfall Savant
38:10 - vs Ajani, Nacatl Pariah
44:14 - vs Velomachus Lorehold
48:13 - vs Alesha, Who Smiles at Death
52:53 - vs Extus, Oriq Overlord

Decklist: 
https://aetherhub.com/Deck/baylen-tokens-brawl
